name: Basil-Tomato Vinaigrette Topping for Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl combine onion, vinegar, salt and black pepper.
2. Let stand for 15 minutes.
3. Whisk in olive oil.
4. Stir in tomato and basil.
5. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
6. Season with more salt and pepper, if desired.
7. Thoroughly mix before using. Serve at room temperature, 1-2 tablespoons per serving.
Makes about 1 1/3 cups. Great as a topping for baked potatoes, salads or as a marinade over fresh-cut vegetables.
